ideal_must_detect.matched_text: International transfer stance: Section 33 PDPO is not commenced, but PCPD guidance is applied and model clauses mirror EU SCC safeguards for onward processing limits.

must_detect.matched_text: International transfer stance: Section 33 PDPO is not commenced, but PCPD guidance is applied and model clauses mirror EU SCC safeguards for onward processing limits.

Harbour Crest Dynamics Limited — HK Data Export Approval Note and DPA Schedule (HKEX-listed, PDPO compliant).
Scope: M&A due diligence data rooms, fund investor onboarding, and employment HR processing by Harbour Crest Dynamics Limited and processors Silver Quay Services Limited and CloudHarbor Technology (HK) Limited.
PDPO basis: personal data has the meaning in PDPO and is processed under DPP1 (minimisation), DPP2 (retention), and DPP3 (use and consent).
MNPI control: this workflow excludes inside information as defined in Part XIVA of the SFO; only HKEX-published announcements or aggregated non-identifiable metrics are in scope.
Cross-border transfer approval: on 2025-02-14 the Data Export Committee approved a one-off, already completed export of masked HR payroll extracts to CloudHarbor Technology Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) with TIAs and contractual safeguards; no live transfer is underway.
International transfer stance: Section 33 PDPO is not commenced, but PCPD guidance is applied and model clauses mirror EU SCC safeguards for onward processing limits.
